title: Monitoring command
description:
Monitoring command

Monitoring command

When the remote RS232 control is not set as the control device but set to be used for monitoring, following commands are only available to be executed.

Remote Command

Login

Logout

GetIO

GetIOByte

GetIOWord

GetMemIO

GetMemIOByte

GetMemIOWord

GetVariable

GetStatus

GetCurRobot

GetAlm
